<?php /* * This file is part of the Predis package. * * (c) 2009-2020 Daniele Alessandri * (c) 2021-2025 Till Krüss * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace Predis\Command\Redis; use Predis\Command\Command as RedisCommand; /** * @see https://redis.io/commands/?name=ACL * * Container command corresponds to any ACL *. * Represents any ACL command with subcommand as first argument. */ class ACL extends RedisCommand { public function getId() { return 'ACL'; } /** * {@inheritdoc} */ public function parseResponse($data) { if (!is_array($data)) { return $data; } if ($data === array_values($data)) { return $data; } // flatten Relay (RESP3) maps $return = []; array_walk($data, function ($value, $key) use (&$return) { $return[] = $key; $return[] = $value; }); return $return; } }
